tags.name: Cooking canned meat Celebrate with abundance

metaData.Ingredients: Cooked Beef, Beef, Salt, Sugar, Sodium Nitrite (Preservative)
metaData.Preparation:
1. Stir-fry onions with olive oil
2. Add Mili Corned Beef
3. Fry till fragrant
4. Set aside to cool
5. Put mixture in cup to form cake shape
6. Coat the cake hsaped corned beef with flour, egg and bread crumb
7. Lightly fry
8. Season (Set2) with salt, pepper
9. Drizzle Set 2 on the fried corned beef
10. Add garnish to serve

metaData.Ingredients: Cooked Beef, Beef, Salt, Sugar and Preservative Sodium Nitrite
metaData.Key Information:

• Serve hot or cold in sandwiches or cube for use in salads or casseroles
